data.title: Personalized Experience
data.description: Focus on delivering personalized music recommendations to users.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms for Discover Weekly and Daily Mix playlists.

data.title: Social Integration
data.description: Enables users to share music across social media platforms.
data.technical_spec: API integrations with Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter.

data.title: Accessibility
data.description: Designs for inclusive user experiences accommodating various needs.
data.technical_spec: Screen reader support and customizable text sizes.

data.title: Global Reach
data.description: Offers music streaming services worldwide supporting multiple languages.
data.technical_spec: Localized content and multi-language support within the app.

data.title: Community Engagement
data.description: Engages with community through playlists and live events.
data.technical_spec: Collaborative playlists and integration with live streaming services.
